message:
fix(tests): update e2e tests to accept PlanReady exit code

The agent plan command returns exit code 1 (PlanReady) when candidates
exist, which is intended success behavior. Updated tests to accept
exit codes 0 or 1 for agent plan commands:
- e2e_workflow.rs: dry_run, shadow_mode, robot_mode, snapshot_then_plan
- session_persistence.rs: plan_with_session_reuses_session_id
- summary_mode.rs: summary_agent_plan_outputs_stub

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
